items.title: Outcry over 'disturbing' video of off-duty police officer pinning 13yo girl on train

children.content: Video of an off-duty police officer restraining a 13yo girl on a Perth train has sparked accusations of excessive force.

items.title: Inside the legal feud between Gina Rinehart and Angela Bennett

children.content: Their fathers were school buddies turned mining pioneers, and in another life they could have been friends — but Gina Rinehart and Angela Bennett came to be opponents in one of the most high-stakes legal battles Australia has ever seen.

image.altText: A background image of a mine site, with pictures of four mining figures from left to right.

items.title: Mental health nurse who raped teen patient, filmed 'upskirting' videos jailed

children.content: A former West Australian mental health nurse is sentenced to 12 years in jail after being convicted for persistent sexual abuse of a teenager and making "upskirting" videos of women and children.

image.altText: Adam McGovern wears a hat, face mask and dark jacket as he walks outside the District Court.

items.title: 'Indefensible' not to crack down on liquor sales in WA towns, minister says

children.content: West Australian Racing and Gaming Minister Paul Papalia says Newman and Kununurra are in for tougher measures, including closing bottle shops for two days each week.

items.title: State guardianship to be investigated in parliamentary inquiry

children.content: The state agencies which control the lives of some of Western Australia's most vulnerable people are set to be scrutinised in a parliamentary inquiry, with public submissions now open.

image.altText: A woman steps into an old, dimly lit hallway.

items.title: Missing royalties labelled 'petty cash' for Gina Rinehart after court ruling

children.content: Gina Rinehart and her company, Hancock Prospecting, are the "clear winners" of what prominent Perth industry commentator Tim Treadgold has declared the "big daddy" of legal battles.

articles.title: Here's what you need to know about the Gina Rinehart court ruling

children.content: The blockbuster court ruling over mining tenements worth billions of dollars in WA's iron ore rich Pilbara is the culmination of a complicated legal battle spanning more than a decade that has pitted family against family and siblings against each other.

articles.title: Split decision as Gina Rinehart, Wright family both claim legal wins

children.content: Gina Rinehart is dealt a blow, with a court finding the family of her father's former business partner has the right to potentially hundreds of millions of dollars in royalties from lucrative Pilbara mining assets.

children.content: Wayne Jeffrey Doherty remained in the Broome community for five months after pleading guilty to rape.

items.title: Australian billionaire Andrew Forrest battles Meta over fake ads

children.content: Australian billionaire mining magnate Andrew Forrest is asking a US federal court in Silicon Valley to hold Meta accountable for scam ads using his likeness without permission.

items.title: Some Australians fear lockdowns. Economists say stagflation is the bigger risk

children.content: As fuel costs surge and supply fears grow, businesses and households say the economic shock from the war in the Middle East is already hitting home.

items.title: Chinese device found in strategic waters near Bali identified

children.content: A large torpedo-shaped device discovered near an island in a strategically important strait between Bali and Lombok has been identified by defence analysts as a Chinese undersea monitoring system.

image.altText: A torpedo-like object in the shallows at a beach.

items.title: Man, 53, charged over seizure of more than 350 cannabis plants

children.content: A 53-year-old Kalgoorlie man is released on bail after the seizure of more than 350 cannabis plants from a property WA Police allege had been converted for the purpose of growing hydroponic cannabis.

items.title: Bank warns of significant surge in inflation as oil price spikes — as it happened

children.content: The Royal Bank of Canada (RBC) expects Australian inflation to surge to 6 per cent, while adding another RBA interest rate hike to its forecast.

items.title: St Kilda announces appeal against Collard ban for homophobic slur

children.content: St Kilda is appealing the nine-match ban given to Lance Collard for uttering a homophobic comment, saying the young forward maintains his innocence.

items.title: Containers for Change set to include wine bottles, but industry unhappy

children.content: A newly formed West Australian wine group warns that bottles of wine produced in the state could increase by $1.25 if the expansion of the Containers for Change scheme goes ahead.

items.title: 'Never thought we'd be homeless': Mother of 13 pleads for help

children.content: Finding a home for a large family in a regional area has left one family camping on the side of the highway in rural New South Wales. Nationally, Indigenous people are over-represented in homelessness statistics.

items.title: What we know about the 'small fire' that became an 'unprecedented' Geelong refinery blaze

children.content: The "unprecedented" fire at one of the two remaining oil refineries in Australia took more than 12 hours to extinguish. Here's what we know about how it unfolded.

items.title: Australia is on the verge of aged care AI boom

children.content: Artificial intelligence-enabled robot companions, personal behaviour monitors and pain management apps could soon be used more widely within the sector.

items.title: Racist comments on WA Police social media posts remain online for days

items.title: 'Mums and dads have been misled': AFL under fire over headgear
